Amended Ntc Of Hearing On Mtn To Set Aside Default Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-05-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Gary R. Kershner, Esq., appearing for STAR CREATIONS, INC., Judgment Debtor.
Alexandr A. Volkov, Esq., appearing for Defendants/Cross-complainants Kevin W. Cheng, Limited Scope Representation.

Judgment Debtor Star Creations. Inc.'s Motion to Set Aside the Amended Judgment entered April 17, 2012 against STAR CREATONS is heard this day.
After argument of respective counsel the court ordered motion granted. Court set aside Judgment as to Star Creations only. Judgment remains as to other defendants.
Star Creations, Inc., Motion to Set Aside Judgment Due to Excess Damage Award is ordered off calendar as moot.
Prevailing party to prepare an order and submit order to counsel for approval as to form.

Judgment Debtor Star Creations. Inc.'s Motion to Set Aside Judgment due to Excess Damage Award is heard this day.
After argument of respective counsel the court ordered off calendar as moot.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-02-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-02-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonai Wong #11288.

Vernon Goins, II, Esq. appeared for Cross-plaintiff Kevin Cheng.
Cross-Plaintiff's Witness Kevin Cheng, was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Cross-defendants AJ Madison, Inc., a New York corp. and Cross-Defendant Home Direct Inc., an Illinois corp. was in default, default was entered on 10-19-10. Cross-defendant AJM Trucking, Inc. a New York corp was dismissed on 07-28-10.
Cross-plaintiff's oral request to amend to add an aka to Cross-defendant's name to AJ Madison, Inc., a New York corp. aka Star Creations dba AJ Madison was granted in open court

After hearing the testimony and considering the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Cross-Plaintiff and against the Cross-Defendants AJ Madison, Inc., a New York corp. aka Star Creations dba AJ Madison and Home Direct Inc., an Illinois corp. as follows:

Damages - $30,929.46
Attorney's Fees - none
Prejudgment Interest - $9,212.00
Costs - $750.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $40,891.46
Counsel to prepare Judgment and submit to Dept. 514 for signature.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
